title: Simple Ruby
description: Adds a new Ruby ore, which can be used to make armor and tools!
body:
Adds a new Ruby ore, which can be used to make armor and tools!

What's new?
- Ruby
- Ruby Block
- Ruby Ore
- Ruby Helmet
- Ruby Chestplate
- Ruby Leggings
- Ruby Boots
- Ruby Pickaxe
- Ruby Sword
- Ruby Axe
- Ruby Hoe
- Ruby Shovel
